reason: Hand-counted discordant pairs (~92 of ~5100) imply AUC ~0.98, several points above the claimed 0.9433.
Sample shows ~44 TP vs ~19 FP among predicted positives, giving precision ~0.70, far below the claimed 0.8817.
Residuals routinely 30-110 with RMS of sampled errors ~57, so the claimed RMSE 32.17 is badly under-reported (lower-is-better).
Sample counts (~49 TP, ~20 FP, ~12 FN) yield F1 ~0.76, matching the claimed 0.7656.
Mean-square of returns gives daily sd ~0.0074 (annualized ~0.117); the claimed 0.0993 implies sd 0.0063, inconsistent with the observed spread (~15% under-reported).
Only ~43/150 sample values exceed 175 and values look uniform on ~[5,247], putting the median near 125-130, not 174.9.
Hand-estimated log loss from ~27 wrong-side rows (~0.95 each), ~45 clipped rows (0.051), and mid rows (~0.35) lands around 0.37-0.42, consistent with the claimed 0.4215.
Sample MSE ~10.5 against target variance ~69 gives R2 ~0.85, subtly inflated to the claimed 0.8937.
No negative scores above ~0.70 while ~56% of positives are, giving precision 1.0 over the top half of recall; integrated PR curve ~0.90-0.92 matches the claimed 0.9191.
Same data as the ~0.37-0.42 log-loss sample (overlapping rows), so the claimed 0.2318 is under-reported by roughly 45% on a lower-is-better metric.
